your_reading_settings.title: Your Reading Settings
your_reading_settings.description: These settings are used to calculate and display your progress.

historical.title: Your Historical Outlook
historical.description: Based on your reading habits since your Look Back Date, how long will it take you to finish the Bible?

30_day.title: Your 30-Day Outlook
30_day.description: Based on your reading habits from the past 30 days, how long will it take you to finish the Bible?

7_day.title: Your 7-Day Outlook
7_day.description: Based on your reading habits from the past 7 days, how long will it take you to finish the Bible?

today.title: Today's Outlook
today.description: Based on your reading today, how long will it take you to finish the Bible?

your_outlook.days_to_finish_at_this_rate: Days to Finish at This Rate
your_outlook.date_to_finish_at_this_rate: Date to Finish at This Rate

set_a_goal.title: Set a Goal
set_a_goal.description: Choose a target date to finish reading the Bible and work backwards to see how many verses you will need to read each day.
set_a_goal.goal_finish_date_error: Goal date must be in the future.
